query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  s.customerName,
  bi.externalId as billingItemId,
  bi.description as billingDescription,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue,
  bi.quantity as biQuantity,
  bi.unitAmount,
  sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8J3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  s.customerName,
  bi.externalId as billingItemId,
  bi.description as billingDescription,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue,
  bi.quantity as biQuantity,
  bi.unitAmount,
  sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8J3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC;
